headlines.headline: Krevan Investments secures $50M contract with a top-tier research institute

sentiment.reasoning: Securing a $50M contract provides a clear, quantifiable revenue boost that will positively impact the company's financial performance.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
